# Lucid L2
> Autonomous AI infrastructure layer with verifiable identity, memory,
> compute, and payments on Solana + EVM.

## Docs
- [Identity & Passports](docs/modules/identity.md)
- [Memory System](docs/modules/memory.md)
- [Receipt System](docs/modules/receipt.md)
- [Epoch & Anchoring](docs/modules/epoch.md)
- [Payment System](docs/modules/payment.md)
- [Compute & Runtime](docs/modules/compute.md)
- [Deployment Control Plane](docs/modules/deployment.md)
- [Anchoring](docs/modules/anchoring.md)
- [Reputation](docs/modules/reputation.md)

## API Reference
- [OpenAPI Spec](openapi.yaml)
- [Identity & Passports Reference](docs/reference/identity.md)
- [Memory System Reference](docs/reference/memory.md)
- [Receipt System Reference](docs/reference/receipt.md)
- [Epoch & Anchoring Reference](docs/reference/epoch.md)
- [Payment System Reference](docs/reference/payment.md)
- [Compute & Runtime Reference](docs/reference/compute.md)
- [Deployment Control Plane Reference](docs/reference/deployment.md)
- [Anchoring Reference](docs/reference/anchoring.md)
- [Reputation Reference](docs/reference/reputation.md)

## Key Interfaces
- AgentWallet: Agent Wallet Provider Interface
- CreatePassportInput: Input for creating a passport
- ERC8004AgentMetadata: ERC-8004 Registry Types
- IAgentWalletProvider: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\identity.md
- INFTProvider: Chain-agnostic NFT provider.
- ITokenLauncher: Token launcher interface — swappable between direct SPL mint and Genesis TGE.
- MintResult: Result of an NFT mint operation
- NFTMetadata: NFT metadata (follows Metaplex / OpenSea standard)
- OnChainSyncHandler: On-chain sync handler interface
- OperationResult: Result type for operations
- ReputationRecord: Reputation feedback record
- ReputationSummary: Average reputation score
- SpendingLimits: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\identity.md
- TokenInfo: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\identity.md
- TokenLaunchParams: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\identity.md
- TokenLaunchResult: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\identity.md
- TransactionRequest: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\identity.md
- TransactionResult: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\identity.md
- ValidationRecord: Validation record returned from the Validation Registry
- WalletBalance: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\identity.md
- ComputeAvailabilityChecker: alias
- ModelCatalogLookup: alias
- ChainVerifyResult: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- CompactionConfig: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- CompactionResult: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- EmbeddingResult: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- EntityMemory: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- EntityRelation: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- EpisodicMemory: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- ExtractionOutputSchema: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- IEmbeddingProvider: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- IMemoryStore: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- IProjectionSink: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md

- ProjectionPolicy: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md

- RecallResponse: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md
- RestoreRequest: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\memory.md

- AgentReceipt: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- AgentReceiptBody: Agent receipt body — the data that gets hashed.
- AgentReceiptInput: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- BatchedEpisodicReceiptBody: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- ComputeReceipt: Extended Signed Receipt for Fluid Compute v0.
- ComputeReceiptBody: Extended Receipt Body for Fluid Compute v0.2.
- ComputeReceiptInput: Input for creating a receipt with extended fields.
- DatasetReceipt: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- DatasetReceiptBody: Dataset receipt body — the data that gets hashed.
- DatasetReceiptInput: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- InferenceReceipt: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- InferenceReceiptBody: Receipt body - the data that gets hashed for receipt_hash.
- InferenceReceiptInput: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- MemoryReceipt: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- MemoryReceiptBody: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- ReceiptCreateOptions: Options for the unified createReceipt function
- ReceiptVerifyResult: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- SerializedMMRProof: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- ToolReceipt: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- ToolReceiptBody: Tool receipt body — the data that gets hashed.
- ToolReceiptInput: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\receipt.md
- Receipt: alias
- ReceiptType: alias

- DeploymentConfig: Configuration for a deployment
- DeploymentResult: Result of a deploy operation
- DeploymentStatus: Current status of a deployment

- HandoffRule: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\compute.md
- IDeployer: Deployer interface — all deployment providers implement this.
- IRuntimeAdapter: Runtime Adapter Interface
- LogOptions: Options for fetching deployment logs
- MonetizationConfig: C:\Lucid-L2\docs\modules\compute.md
- RuntimeArtifact: Agent runtime artifact — the output of code generation, input to deployment

## Stack
- TypeScript 5.0, Node.js 20+, Express 4.18
- Solana (Anchor 0.31), EVM (ethers 6, viem 2)
- Supabase PostgreSQL, SQLite (per-agent), Redis
- Arweave, Lighthouse (DePIN storage)
